prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-WSSLOTTED-YJJ-74595-72 Product Type: FOOD_SPATULA Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Cream Wheat Straw Slotted Spatula with Stainless Steel Handle Kitchen Utensils, 13 Inch Description: Want to step up your cooking and meal prep game? Then you need the Beille slotted spatula made with wheat straw. These spatulas are made with an innovative plant based material called wheat straw that mimics classic kitchen tools without the harmful byproducts of traditional plastic.

Wheat straw is a bioplastic that is not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable and a great zero waste option. It’s certified BPA free and is food safe so you can count on it for food and meal prep. The slotted spatula is dishwasher safe for easy clean-up after use.

The spatula features a sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last. The handle comes with a slot for easy hanging storage if preferred, and it comes in a trendy and warm cream color that will fit with any kitchen decor.

Every kitchen needs a reliable, durable slotted spatula. With the Beille wheat straw plant based spatula, you can cook and meal prep with peace of mind knowing you’re doing your part to protect yourself, your family, and the planet from harmful materials. Search Terms: wheat straw cooking baking supplies tools chef restaurant equipment sustainable products bake food meal prep kitchen starter set wedding house warming gifts new home college dorm room essentials spatula pizza pancakes bbq accessories frittata pan Features: - ESSENTIAL KITCHEN SPATULA: Beille slotted spatula is a must have kitchen tool for cooking, meal, and food prep; large handle with a wide spatula base will quickly and safely turn food while cooking and keep your hands safe from heat - PLANT BASED MATERIAL: Unique kitchen spatula is made of bioplastic wheat straw; plant based material not made from fossil fuels making it more sustainable; Innovative material is a great zero waste option; Certified BPA free - SLOTTED AND DURABLE: Beille wheat straw spatula mimics traditional plastic spatulas and food turners without harmful byproducts; slotted head spatula is dishwasher safe and can be used with both hot and cold food ingredients - STAINLESS STEEL HANDLE: Sturdy handle made of durable, corrosion resistant stainless steel that won’t rust so you can count on it to last; Comes with handy slot in handle for easy hang storage if preferred; Trendy cream color will fit nicely with any kitchen decor - SPECIFICATIONS - Colors: cream, chrome; Material: 60% wheat straw, 40% polypropylene, stainless steel; Dimensions: 13 x 3.2 inches === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13 in Cream Wheat Straw Slotted Spatula

anthropic.title_differentiation: Plant-Based Wheat Straw, Stainless Steel Handle, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Eco-Friendly, Heat Resistant

openai.title_differentiation: Wheat Straw Bioplastic, BPA-Free, Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel Handle, Hanging Slot, Heat Safe, 13 Inch
